summary: Export Formats Feature Testing - Iteration 21. Tested new export formats: Quiz as DOCX (backend), Data Table as XLSX (backend), Flashcards as PPTX (frontend pptxgenjs). Fixed SaveOutputRequest model to accept Union[List[dict], dict] for slides_data. All backend export endpoints working correctly. Frontend export triggers verified.

minor.issue: SaveOutputRequest model had slides_data typed as Optional[List[dict]] but quiz/datatable return dict
minor.fix_applied: Changed line 1126 in server.py from 'slides_data: Optional[List[dict]]' to 'slides_data: Optional[Union[List[dict], dict]]'

ui_bugs.issue: pptxgenjs color warnings for 8-digit hex colors with alpha channel (e.g., 'FFFFFF80', '004D4008'). Colors fall back to black.
ui_bugs.priority: LOW - cosmetic only, export still works

Backend: POST /api/export/quiz-docx with empty sections returns valid DOCX - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/quiz-docx with MCQ only returns valid DOCX - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/datatable-xlsx returns valid XLSX file with correct content-type - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/datatable-xlsx with empty tables returns valid XLSX - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/datatable-xlsx with stats only returns valid XLSX - PASS
Backend: /api/generate quiz returns correct structure {mcq, truefalse, short} - PASS
Backend: /api/generate datatable returns correct structure {tables, stats} - PASS
Backend: /api/generate flashcards returns array of card objects - PASS
Backend: /api/generate mindmap returns dict with center and branches - PASS
Backend: /api/generate slides returns list (no regression) - PASS
Backend: /api/generate report returns list (no regression) - PASS
Backend: /api/generate infographic returns list (no regression) - PASS
Frontend: Studio panel shows all output types (Quiz, Data Table, Flashcards, Mind Map, etc.) - PASS
Frontend: Flashcards export triggers PPTX generation via pptxgenjs - PASS
Frontend: Quiz modal opens with Export button visible - PASS
Frontend: Data Table modal opens with Export button visible - PASS
Frontend: Quiz export triggers DOCX download via backend endpoint - PASS

fixed_issues.issue: SaveOutputRequest model slides_data field typed as List[dict] but quiz/datatable return dict, causing Pydantic validation error when saving outputs
fixed_issues.fix: Changed slides_data type from 'Optional[List[dict]]' to 'Optional[Union[List[dict], dict]]'

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix pptxgenjs color warnings by converting 8-digit hex colors to 6-digit (remove alpha channel) in flashcard PPTX generation
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/export/quiz-docx creates professional DOCX with title page, MCQ/TF/Short sections, and answer key
Backend /api/export/datatable-xlsx creates workbook with Summary sheet + one sheet per data table
Frontend downloadOutput function correctly routes: flashcards→PPTX (pptxgenjs), quiz→DOCX (backend), datatable→XLSX (backend), mindmap→PNG (canvas)
SaveOutputRequest model now matches GenerateResponse model with Union[List[dict], dict] for slides_data
seed_data_creation: Created Quiz and Data Table outputs via /api/generate and saved via /api/outputs for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export formats feature is complete. Backend has two new endpoints: /api/export/quiz-docx (accepts {title, quiz_data:{mcq,truefalse,short}}) and /api/export/datatable-xlsx (accepts {title, table_data:{tables,stats}}). Frontend downloadOutput function routes each type to its export method: flashcards use pptxgenjs for PPTX, quiz calls backend for DOCX, datatable calls backend for XLSX, mindmap uses canvas for PNG. SaveOutputRequest model was fixed to accept Union[List[dict], dict] for slides_data field.

feature_verification_summary.quiz_docx_backend_endpoint: PASS - Returns valid DOCX with professional formatting
feature_verification_summary.datatable_xlsx_backend_endpoint: PASS - Returns valid XLSX with Summary + table sheets
feature_verification_summary.flashcards_pptx_frontend: PASS - pptxgenjs generates PPTX with one slide per card
feature_verification_summary.mindmap_png_no_regression: PASS - Still exports as PNG via canvas renderer
feature_verification_summary.report_png_no_regression: PASS - Still exports as PNG via visual report renderer
feature_verification_summary.infographic_png_no_regression: PASS - Still exports as PNG via infographic renderer
